channel.title: First-Party Data on Carney
channel.description: Recent content in First-Party Data on Carney

item.title: Building & Managing Your Marketing Database in a Cookie-Less World
item.description: Your database is not glamorous. Nobody wins a standing ovation for good contact hygiene. But when it is a mess, the whole revenue engine starts coughing up hairballs. In a cookie-less world, the old lazy habits get expensive fast. If you want a database that actually helps marketing and sales instead of quietly sabotaging them, you need better inputs, better discipline, and a little less obsession with collecting every possible field like you are building a hostage dossier.
